summary: Comprehensive testing completed for Kissan AI agricultural assistant app. All backend APIs (100% success rate) and frontend features working correctly. Authentication, weather, AI chat, community, and disease scanner all functional.
passed_tests: Backend API health check (200)
Weather API - returns current conditions and spraying data
User authentication - login/logout with session cookies
Soil estimation API with SoilGrids fallback to regional estimates
AI Chat integration - Gemini API responding with farming advice
Chat history persistence
Community posts CRUD operations
Post like/unlike functionality
Farm info update API
Onboarding page loads with Namaste splash screen
Dashboard shows weather card, soil profile, quick actions
Weather page with spraying conditions and 24h planner
Chat page with AI responses and suggestion chips
Disease scanner page with camera/upload options
Community page with post creation and feed
Profile page with farm info editing and language switching
Bottom navigation works across all pages
All quick action buttons functional
Tab switching on weather page
Session authentication working properly
